_comment: Seed baseline for eval-gate.mjs. total=0 means eval-gate treats this as 'no baseline yet' (see compareToBaseline: hasBaseline requires total>0), so the FIRST real nightly run seeds the real baseline rather than gating against this placeholder. A follow-up can wire nightly-eval.yml to overwrite this file (via nextBaseline()) and open a small PR when the run passes, at which point real deltas start being tracked.
